subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hast caused the clouds of Thy mercy to pour forth upon the realms of existence, both hidden and manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من افاض سحائب رحمته على اراضى الوجود من الغیب و الشهود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
